subject: docs: fix stale references from doc trigger audit
body:
STYLE_GUIDE.md: Cards and Tabs examples still used old hardcoded
dark:bg-zinc/border-zinc classes. Updated to DaisyUI tokens.

USER_GUIDE.md: Header controls table said "Dark/Light Mode" toggle.
Updated to describe ThemeSelector with per-mode theme selection.

TESTING_GUIDE.md: Added TH1-TH4 test scenarios for ThemeSelector
covering mode toggle, per-mode theme selection, invalid theme recovery,
and keyboard navigation.

Tags: docs, testing, theme
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch

title: fix stale references from doc trigger audit
